examples.exam_en: The case was handled by a provincial court.
She works for a provincial newspaper.
The wound smarted for hours.
His eyes smarted from the gas.
She grew tired of his endless complaints.
The meeting was filled with endless chatter.
The soldiers defended the isolated fortress alone.
They found an isolated village in the mountains.
He was drunk on gin when they found him.
examples.exam_ko: 그들이 그를 발견했을 때 그는 진에 취해 있었다.

examples.exam_en: Tom came to work drunk.
The map shows the geographical features of the region.
examples.exam_ko: 그 지도는 그 지역의 지리적 특징을 보여준다.

examples.exam_en: They studied the geographical distribution of the species.
examples.exam_ko: 그들은 그 종의 지리적 분포를 연구했다.

examples.exam_en: The country has a dynamic economy.
examples.exam_ko: 그 나라는 역동적인 경제를 가지고 있다.

examples.exam_en: She is a dynamic leader who inspires her team.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 팀에 영감을 주는 역동적인 리더다.

examples.exam_en: The students thought he was a boring teacher.
The lecture was incredibly boring.
The library announced several forthcoming books.
Everyone is watching the forthcoming presidential election.
examples.exam_ko: 모두가 다가오는 대통령 선거를 지켜보고 있다.

examples.exam_en: Their marriage turned out to be unfortunate.
The location was unfortunate for a new business.
examples.exam_ko: 그 위치는 새 사업에 부적합한 곳이었다.

examples.exam_en: She gave a definite answer to the question.
He had a definite reason for his decision.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 자신의 결정에 분명한 이유가 있었다.

examples.exam_en: They stayed in a super deluxe hotel suite.
The new model has super performance.
examples.exam_ko: 신형 모델은 뛰어난 성능을 가지고 있다.

examples.exam_en: The discovery was a notable event in science.
examples.exam_ko: 그 발견은 과학에서 주목할 만한 사건이었다.

examples.exam_en: He is a notable doctor in the field.
We took an indirect route to avoid traffic.
examples.exam_ko: 우리는 교통 체증을 피해 우회 경로를 택했다.

examples.exam_en: The policy had an indirect influence on prices.
examples.exam_ko: 그 정책은 물가에 간접적인 영향을 미쳤다.

examples.exam_en: He wore a shirt with a stiff collar.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 빳빳한 칼라가 달린 셔츠를 입었다.

examples.exam_en: My shoulders feel stiff after sitting all day.
examples.exam_ko: 하루 종일 앉아 있었더니 어깨가 뻣뻣하다.

examples.exam_en: A stiff breeze made walking difficult.
She grew up in a wealthy family.
He wrote an essay wealthy in philosophical insight.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 철학적 통찰이 풍부한 논문을 썼다.

examples.exam_en: The new worker seemed awkward on the job.
examples.exam_ko: 새 직원은 일하는 것이 서툴러 보였다.

examples.exam_en: He is awkward with his hands.
She walked with lively steps down the street.
The class had a lively discussion on the topic.
examples.exam_ko: 수업에서 그 주제에 대해 활발한 토론이 벌어졌다.

examples.exam_en: Switzerland remained a neutral state during the war.
The judge maintained a neutral attitude throughout the trial.
examples.exam_ko: 판사는 재판 내내 공정한 태도를 유지했다.

examples.exam_en: The painting has great artistic beauty.
examples.exam_ko: 그 그림은 뛰어난 예술적 아름다움을 지니고 있다.

examples.exam_en: The director achieved a stunning artistic effect.
